name: Tether
description: All USDT0 Network tokens (USDT0 and XAUt0) are Omnichain Fungible Tokens (OFT). The OFT standard allows tokens to move seamlessly across multiple blockchains using LayerZero's messaging protocol, ensuring a unified supply across all chains. USDT0 tokens leverage LayerZero's infrastructure to enable secure and efficient cross-chain transfers.
